__package__.yml.rawContents:
service:
  auth: false
  base-path: ''
  endpoints:
    listItems:
      path: /items
      method: GET
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      response:
        docs: A list of items
        type: string
        status-code: 200
      examples:
        - response:
            body: string
    authorize:
      path: /authorize
      method: GET
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      request:
        name: AuthorizeRequest
        query-parameters:
          client_id: optional<string>
      response:
        docs: Authorization response
        type: string
        status-code: 200
      url: Auth
      examples:
        - response:
            body: string
    uploadFile:
      path: /files/content
      method: POST
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      response:
        docs: Upload response
        type: string
        status-code: 200
      url: Upload
      examples:
        - response:
            body: string
    downloadFile:
      path: /downloads/{id}/content
      method: GET
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      request:
        name: DownloadFileRequest
        path-parameters:
          id: string
      response:
        docs: Download response
        type: string
        status-code: 200
      url: Download
      examples:
        - path-parameters:
            id: id
          response:
            body: string
  source:
    openapi: ../openapi.yml

rootApiFile.rawContents:
name: api
error-discrimination:
  strategy: status-code
display-name: Test API
environments:
  Production:
    urls:
      Base: https://api.example.com/2.0
      Auth: https://account.example.com/oauth2
      Upload: https://upload.example.com/2.0
      Download: https://dl.example.com/2.0
default-environment: Production
default-url: Base
